spirit:component.spirit:name: vadc

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M00_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of S_AXIS address bus. The slave accepts the read and write addresses of width C_M_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M00_AXIS_START_COUNT
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Start count is the number of clock cycles the master will wait before initiating/issuing any transaction.

spirit:component.spirit:description: ADC controller for FIR filter bank.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_S00_AXI_DATA_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C S00 AXI DATA WIDTH

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_S00_AXI_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C S00 AXI ADDR WIDTH

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_S00_AXI_BASEADDR
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C S00 AXI BASEADDR

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_S00_AXI_HIGHADDR
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C S00 AXI HIGHADDR

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M00_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M00 AXIS TDATA WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Width of S_AXIS address bus. The slave accepts the read and write addresses of width C_M_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M00_AXIS_START_COUNT
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M00 AXIS START COUNT
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Start count is the number of clock cycles the master will wait before initiating/issuing any transaction.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: USR_CLK_CYCLE_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: Clock Cycle of adc_clk (ns) (to generate clock for sampling)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T_CYCLE_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T_CYCLE unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T_RESET_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T_RESET unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T_CONV_MIN_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T_CONV_MIN unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T_CONV_MAX_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T_CONV_MAX unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T1_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T1 unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T2_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T2 unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T10_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T10 unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T11_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T11 unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T14_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T14 unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T15_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T15 unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: T26_NS
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: T26 unit: ns (refer to AD7606 datasheet)

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: FRAME_HEADER
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: ADC Data Frame Header

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: FRAME_TAILER
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: ADC Data Frame Tailer
